# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        allow:
          - service: frontend
            namespace: frontend
          - service: backend
            namespace: backend
          - service: auth
            namespace: auth
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        allow:
          - service: frontend
            namespace: frontend
          - service: backend
            namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: auth
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        allow:
          - service: frontend
            namespace: frontend
          - service: auth
            namespace: auth
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc-account
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth
  namespace: auth
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
    namespace: auth
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc-account
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-auth
  namespace: auth
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
    namespace: auth
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc-account
          namespace: backend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc-account
          namespace: backend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc-account
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080
